prompt_text:
### Demographics: 53-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 3 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after hyperglycemia symptoms (polyuria, polydipsia, weight loss)
Current symptoms: Postprandial fatigue and thirst noted; no DKA/HHS signs; no recent hypoglycemia

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3a (45-59)
ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of PCI/stent); Coronary artery disease (History of CABG)
MASH
Body mass index category: Overweight
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3a (45-59); HF (No); ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of PCI/stent); MASLD: MASH; BMI Category: Overweight
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (younger brother)
- Social history: Never smoker; Alcohol 5-6 drinks/week (1-2 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Semaglutide 1mg once weekly; Fluticasone/salmeterol Inhaler (twice daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily), Nitrofurantoin (100 mg twice daily for prophylaxis)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 58.3 kg; Height 155.2 cm; BMI 24.2 kg/m²; Blood pressure 131/84 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 8.3%; 9 months ago 7.9%; 6 months ago 7.4%; 3 months ago 6.9%; current 5.8%), FPG (12 months ago 228mg/dL; 9 months ago 214mg/dL; 6 months ago 197mg/dL; 3 months ago 175mg/dL; current 108mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 59.9kg; 9 months ago 58.9kg; 6 months ago 53.9kg; 3 months ago 53.7kg; current 58.3kg), Height (12 months ago 155.2cm; 9 months ago 155.2cm; 6 months ago 155.2cm; 3 months ago 155.2cm; current 155.2cm), BMI (12 months ago 25.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 24.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 23.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 22.0kg/m²; current 24.2kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 136mmHg; 9 months ago 136mmHg; 6 months ago 136mmHg; 3 months ago 134mmHg; current 131mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 84mmHg; 9 months ago 87mmHg; 6 months ago 85mmHg; 3 months ago 85mmHg; current 84mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 58U/L; 9 months ago 49U/L; 6 months ago 46U/L; 3 months ago 44U/L; current 56U/L), AST (12 months ago 44U/L; 9 months ago 44U/L; 6 months ago 47U/L; 3 months ago 45U/L; current 49U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.6mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.6mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.5mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.5mg/dL; current 0.5mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 48mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 48mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 47mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 47mL/min/1.73m²; current 47mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 162mg/g; 9 months ago 200mg/g; 6 months ago 184mg/g; 3 months ago 136mg/g; current 160mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 85mg/dL; 9 months ago 84mg/dL; 6 months ago 90mg/dL; 3 months ago 84mg/dL; current 87mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 37mg/dL; 9 months ago 36mg/dL; 6 months ago 34mg/dL; 3 months ago 34mg/dL; current 35mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 94mg/dL; 9 months ago 92mg/dL; 6 months ago 96mg/dL; 3 months ago 94mg/dL; current 103mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 12.0g/dL; 9 months ago 11.2g/dL; 6 months ago 11.9g/dL; 3 months ago 11.2g/dL; current 11.6g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Negative (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Excellent adherence (estimated ≥90%); SMBG 4-5 times/week; diet/exercise well controlled.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
